title: Superb War
description: This Modpack is One That I Randomly Made And Thought It Would Be Good to Release It
body: A Modpack That Mixes [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) With [Superb Warfare](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare) + Additional Addons + A Few Performance Mods. (BTW scince [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) Is Unavailable For Forge, I used a Port of sodium so don't expect to get the best Performence. The Mod is Called [Radium](https://modrinth.com/mod/radium) if You Wanna Check it Out)
